comment.body:
Well, Alma never actually said that. What she said, exactly, was that the market is pricing in volatility expansion, but don’t forget that volatility works in both directions. She also mentioned that it’s a good setup for reversion trades.
Look, on both days so far, we’ve seen theta decay and vol decay. You can't win on 0DTE without volatility. The skew points to a volatility increase on Thursday, but if you read today’s post, it says that above 6150, it's a spot up/vol up scenario.
Be careful not to twist her words.
